# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a React application. Install Node.js, run npm install, build the production bundle with npm run build, and serve it with a lightweight HTTP server. Keep the Dockerfile simple and easy to understand for our team.
# Category: container_security

# Pull a base image
FROM node:14

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package.json and package-lock.json
COPY package*.json ./

# Install dependencies
RUN npm install

# Copy all files
COPY . .

# Build react application
RUN npm run build

# Pull a lightweight base image
FROM nginx:alpine

# Copy build files from builder stage into nginx html directory
COPY --from=0 /app/build /usr/share/nginx/html

# Expose port
EXPOSE 80

# Command to start the server
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
